title: lemuranthe gymnochiloides
intro: Lemuranthe gymnochiloides is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is also known as the 'Himalayan Slipper Orchid' but is actually a member of the Gesneriad family. However, I can't find any reliable information about the medicinal properties or health benefits of Lemuranthe gymnochiloides.
